notes: Pulled by scripts/pull_arkansas_statutes.py. The Arkansas Code Annotated has no clean structured free official source (LexisNexis publishes the official annotated code under copyright). Justia is the primary structured free mirror for the public-domain section text. The puller discovers section URLs by walking Title -> Chapter -> Subchapter -> Section links (subtitle/subchapter-agnostic) rather than constructing them. Justia sits behind Cloudflare bot-fight mode and 403s against stdlib urllib and many shared-egress IPs; the puller uses curl_cffi with Chrome TLS impersonation when available and falls back to well-formed pointer stubs when fetch fails. The _file_is_stub guard preserves committed verbatim content.
